message:
feat: integrate Tailscale hostname into cloud-init

- Add TailscaleHostname field to CloudInitConfig struct
- Generate method uses TailscaleHostname for tailscale up command,
  falling back to Hostname when not set
- Add --accept-routes flag to tailscale up command
- Task struct includes TailscaleHostname for persistence
- Database schema migration adds tailscale_hostname column
- Update CreateTask, GetTask, and ListTasks to handle new field

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
